name: SENTINEL AML/CFT
description: AML/CFT compliance screening via x402 micropayments: screen entities against 1.1M+ watchlist records (OFAC SDN, UN, EU sanctions, PEP, Interpol, World Bank debarment, crypto addresses), 163-country jurisdiction risk scoring (FATF, Basel AML Index, CPI), Mauritius FSC registry + ICIJ offshore leaks. ERC-8004 agent registration hosted. Pay-per-query USDC on Base.
